productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Vanquish 5 M Black Sports Shoes
description: Offering lightweight comfort and packed with features, the adidas Vanquish 5 makes for a fabulous running shoe, offering breathable comfort and barasion resistance mile after mile. For those who love to flaunt a sporty style, this shoe also makes for a great casual wear.UpperHeavily meshed upper for enhanced breathablity and lightweight comfortSynthetic leather overlays with adidas patented 3-Stripes on the sides for enhanced shoe structureMeshed and padded tongue and collar for breathable comfortCentral lacing system for a snug, customised FitPadded sockliner for all-day comfort and shock absorptionRemovable sockliner to accommodate an orthoticMidsoleLitestrike EVA midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protectionOutsoleTPR outsole with circular and waffle pattern lugs for absolute grip and tractionImpact guidance line for better shock distribution and enhanced energy returnShoe careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
